step_rationale: Adipokine from pericoronary fat; dysregulation promotes vascular inflammation and endothelial dysfunction in CAD.
mechanism: Pericoronary SEMA3B dysregulation drives vascular inflammation and endothelial dysfunction contributing to atherosclerotic plaque development.

references.title: Single-Nucleus Transcriptomic Atlas of Human Pericoronary Epicardial Adipose Tissue in Normal and Pathological Conditions.
